headline: DLR Opens First Data Center in Barcelona, Expands Mediterranean Reach
summary: Digital Realty opens its first Barcelona data center, BCN1, boosting Mediterranean connectivity and supporting AI and cloud infrastructure growth.

headline: Options Technology Named Digital Realty’s EMEA Partner of the Year for 2025
summary: LONDON & NEW YORK & HONG KONG, May 19, 2026--Options Technology, the leading managed IT services and technology solutions provider, today announced it has been named Digital Realty's Partner of the Year for EMEA for 2025. The award, presented as part of Digital Realty's annual Partner Awards program, recognizes channel and alliance partners who drive the most meaningful impact for Digital Realty and its customers.
